winner: I went to deseed my peppers, but then I realized—pepper is already its own seasoning!

candidates.text: I took a class on cooking, and it was intense. We learned how to properly deseed a pepper without breaking the skin—it’s all about patience and precision. You know you’ve done it right when there’s nothing left but pure heat. I’d say it was spicy work, but honestly, it wasn’t *that* bad.

candidates.text: I had to deseed my peppers for this salsa recipe, but I forgot—now I'm just sprinkling hot tears on everything!
I love to cook, especially spicy dishes. I once tried making hot sauce and decided to deseed my peppers... and then I realized I just made a dessert without any chocolate.
I deseeded a pepper for my salsa, but then I realized I was just making it less spicy and more boring—turns out, the seeds were the real party in that pepper!
